title: Software Update - DFU - Can be completed for standalone headsets
scenario: Software Update (DFU) completes successfully for standalone headset via Device Settings > Software
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure the headset is paired and connected to the app via Bluetooth.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, scroll to and tap on 'Software' (or 'Software Update').
5. Tap the 'Update' or 'Check for Update' button.
6. Wait for the DFU (Device Firmware Update) process to download and install the new firmware.
7. Do not disconnect or power off the headset until the update completes.
expected: The headset firmware is successfully updated to the latest version. The app displays a success message and the headset reconnects automatically.
